title: Engineering Leadership
description: Building and scaling engineering teams that ship — setting the bar, growing the people, and creating the conditions for sustained, high-quality output.
Designing organizations that match the work — clear ownership, processes that serve outcomes, and cross-functional alignment between engineering, product and the business.
title: Organization Design

description: Architecting durable, performance-first systems with a *code-is-a-liability* mindset — balancing reliability, developer experience and cost so platforms keep paying off years later.
title: Systems & Architecture
R&D & Innovation
description: Turning open-ended problems into validated bets — rapid prototyping, tight feedback loops, and scaling proven ideas from experiment to production platform.
